title: Bosses' addition
description: a great challenge for those who are bored from vanilla, all in vanilla.
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/bosses-addition?logo=modrinth&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-addition) [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/bosses-addition?logo=modrinth&label=&style=flat&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-addition) [![CF](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1226483_all.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bosses-addition) [![CF](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_1226483.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bosses-addition) # **Bosses' Addition** ## **Description:** Are you bored of fighting the same old vanilla mobs? **Bosses' Addition** introduces **5 unique bosses**, each one more powerful than the last! Face off against these **customized vanilla mobs** with increased stats and special gear. All of this is done **entirely in vanilla Minecraft**, no mods required! ## **How It Works:** - Use `/trigger easyboss` to summon the **easiest boss**, balanced for iron-tier players. - Progress through harder bosses using `/trigger mediumboss`, `/trigger hardboss`, and `/trigger extremeboss`. - Challenge **the Final Boss** with `/trigger finalboss`—a massive, heavily-armored undead with a **Soul Reaper Bow** and **500 HP**! - Each boss **spawns above you** and comes fully equipped with **gear, weapons, and buffs**. ## Trailer ## **Installation:** ### Method 1: 1. Download the **Bosses' Addition** datapack. 2. Place the `.zip` file in your Minecraft world’s `datapacks` folder (`.minecraft/saves/[Your World]/datapacks`). 3. Enter your world and run `/reload`. 4. Start the datapack with `/trigger easyboss`. ### Method 2: 1. Download the **Bosses' Addition** mod for your modloader. 2. Place the `.jar` file in your Minecraft `mods` folder. 3. Enter your world. 4. Start the mod with `/trigger easyboss`. ## **Extras** for anyone using **1.3.5** there's a secret easter egg in the datapack
easter egg - throw a diamond & bow - a message appears announcing the easter egg activation - shoot with a bow
### Note: make sure you have particles on
